payload.message:
Execute Morning Intelligence Workflow (minimal payload).

MANDATORY FIRST STEP: Read and follow SYSTEM instructions from:
- /home/manpac/.openclaw/workspace/skills/morning-intelligence/SYSTEM.md

Hard constraints (do not reinterpret):
- Do NOT change schedule/timezone/enabled (cron-managed).
- Do NOT change sections/features.
- Obey delivery constraints exactly as written in SYSTEM.md (explicit channel_id, News Extension standalone to 1477319018992898171, retry once, no fallback).
- Obey dedupe/checkpoint rules exactly as written in SYSTEM.md (skip repost if stage=ok).

Then execute the workflow and deliver messages as specified.

Run Brokia thesis deadline T-7 check from checklist and send Slack alerts only when due.

Steps:
1) Read: /home/manpac/.openclaw/workspace/brokia/thesis-hub/02_ACADEMIC_CHECKLIST.md
2) Execute: python3 /home/manpac/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/brokia_deadline_checklist_alert.py
3) Use dedupe checkpoint: /home/manpac/.openclaw/workspace/checkpoints/brokia/deadlines-YYYY-MM-DD.json
4) Send alerts to Slack channel mapping 'brokia-ai-alerts' from /home/manpac/.openclaw/workspace/CHANNELS.md
5) Do NOT alert EXCLUDED/MAL dates listed in checklist.

Brokia — Weekly Planning (execution)

Hard rules:
- Do NOT modify other cron jobs.

Steps:
1) Read:
   - /home/manpac/.openclaw/workspace/brokia/thesis-hub/01_BRIEF.md
   - /home/manpac/.openclaw/workspace/brokia/thesis-hub/02_ACADEMIC_CHECKLIST.md
   - /home/manpac/.openclaw/workspace/brokia/thesis-hub/03_ROADMAP.md
   - /home/manpac/.openclaw/workspace/brokia/thesis-hub/04_BACKLOG.md
2) Execute script (writes checkpoint + updates backlog + posts to Slack+Discord):
   python3 /home/manpac/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/brokia_weekly_planning.py
3) Reply with a one-line status: weekly plan posted + checkpoint path.
